C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libtmxlite.a CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/FreeFuncs.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/ImageLayer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/LayerGroup.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/Map.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/Object.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/ObjectGroup.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/ObjectTypes.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/Property.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/TileLayer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/Tileset.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/detail/pugixml.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/tmxlite.dir/libs/tmxlite/src/miniz.c.obj
C:\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libtmxlite.a
